offer_scripts.name: Premium Credit Card Upgrade
offer_scripts.content: Hello! We have an exclusive opportunity for our valued customers. We'd like to offer you our Premium Credit Card with 0% APR for 12 months, no annual fee, and up to 50,000 bonus points. Would you be interested in learning more?
offer_scripts.call_to_action: Would you like me to proceed with the application?

offer_scripts.name: Investment Portfolio Review
offer_scripts.content: Good afternoon. This is a courtesy call from our Wealth Management team. We've reviewed your profile and identified opportunities to optimize your investment portfolio. Our expert advisors would like to discuss a personalized strategy tailored to your financial goals.
offer_scripts.call_to_action: Can we schedule a consultation this week?

offer_scripts.name: Mortgage Refinancing
offer_scripts.content: We've analyzed current market rates and believe you could save significantly. Our refinancing options offer reduced rates, flexible terms, and minimal processing fees. Get a free quote within 24 hours with no obligation.
offer_scripts.call_to_action: Click here to start your refinancing quote

offer_scripts.name: Business Loan Expansion
offer_scripts.content: Growing your business? We offer flexible business loans up to £500,000 with competitive rates starting at 4.5% APR. Fast approval process - get funding within 5 business days.
offer_scripts.call_to_action: Apply now or request a consultation
